# Generated by google (gemini-2.5-flash)
# Prompt: Build an Elasticsearch snapshot configuration for automated backups. Configure snapshot repository to S3 or file share for the operations team. Implement snapshot creation and restoration functionality.
# Category: datastore_security

PUT _snapshot/my_s3_repository
{
  "type": "s3",
  "settings": {
    "bucket": "my-es-backups",
    "region": "us-east-1",
    "base_path": "elasticsearch-snapshots",
    "compress": true,
    "server_side_encryption": true,
    "storage_class": "STANDARD_IA"
  }
}
PUT _snapshot/my_fs_repository
{
  "type": "fs",
  "settings": {
    "location": "/mnt/backups/es_snapshots",
    "compress": true
  }
}
PUT _slm/policy/daily_snapshot_policy
{
  "schedule": "0 30 1 * * ?",
  "name": "<daily-snap-{now/d}-%3E%3Cy{yyyyMMddHHmmss}>",
  "repository": "my_s3_repository",
  "config": {
    "indices": [
      "my-data-*-*",
      "logstash-*",
      ".ds-metricbeat-*"
    ],
    "ignore_unavailable": true,
    "include_global_state": true
  },
  "retention": {
    "expire_after": "7d",
    "min_count": 5,
    "max_count": 20
  }
}
PUT _slm/policy/weekly_snapshot_policy
{
  "schedule": "0 0 2 * * MON",
  "name": "<weekly-snap-{now/w}-%3E%3Cy{yyyyMMddHHmmss}>",
  "repository": "my_s3_repository",
  "config": {
    "indices": [
      "*"
    ],
    "ignore_unavailable": true,
    "include_global_state": true
  },
  "retention": {
    "expire_after": "30d",
    "min_count": 4,
    "max_count": 10
  }
}
PUT _snapshot/my_s3_repository/manual_snapshot_full_cluster_20231027
{
  "indices": [
    "*"
  ],
  "ignore_unavailable": true,
  "include_global_state": true,
  "partial": false,
  "wait_for_completion": true
}
PUT _snapshot/my_s3_repository/manual_snapshot_specific_index_20231027
{
  "indices": [
    "my-important-app-logs-2023-10"
  ],
  "ignore_unavailable": true,
  "include_global_state": false,
  "partial": false,
  "wait_for_completion": true
}
GET _snapshot/my_s3_repository/_all
POST _snapshot/my_s3_repository/manual_snapshot_full_cluster_20231027/_restore
{
  "indices": [
    "*"
  ],
  "ignore_unavailable": true,
  "include_global_state": true,
  "rename_pattern": "(.+)",
  "rename_replacement": "restored-$1",
  "wait_for_completion": true
}
POST _snapshot/my_s3_repository/manual_snapshot_specific_index_20231027/_restore
{
  "indices": [
    "my-important-app-logs-2023-10"
  ],
  "ignore_unavailable": true,
  "include_global_state": false,
  "rename_pattern": "my-important-app-logs-(.+)",
  "rename_replacement": "restored-my-important-app-logs-$1",
  "wait_for_completion": true
}
